name: Single Purchase
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>点</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>買</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand (other than this card), and none of them are monsters: Banish your entire hand face-up; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand. If you do, you cannot Normal or Special Summon any monsters for the rest of this turn, except monsters with that name.
eff: If you have 3 or more cards in your hand (other than this card), and none of them are monsters: Banish your entire hand face-up; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand. If you do, you cannot Normal or Special Summon any monsters for the rest of this turn, except monsters with that name.
